title: Understanding EscaraPay Payouts: When and How You Get Paid
subtitle: Everything sellers need to know about receiving payments, UTR numbers, and payout timelines
metaDescription: Learn exactly when and how EscaraPay pays sellers. Understand the payout tab, UTR numbers, commission structure, and what happens after buyer confirms delivery.

content.text: One of the most common questions from EscaraPay sellers is — 'When will I get paid?' This guide explains exactly how our payout system works, what the Payouts tab shows, and what to expect after each order is delivered.

items.title: Buyer pays token
items.desc: Buyer pays token via Cashfree (UPI/card/net banking). Funds are held by EscaraPay.

items.title: Seller dispatches
items.desc: Seller marks order as dispatched with tracking number. Token remains held.

items.title: Buyer confirms delivery
items.desc: Buyer taps the confirmation link — or 14 days pass with no response — token releases.

items.title: Admin transfers payout
items.desc: EscaraPay admin manually transfers the amount to seller's UPI ID within 24 hours.

items.title: Seller receives UTR
items.desc: Seller gets an email with UTR number and amount for their records.

content.caption: EscaraPay payouts are processed manually by admin within 24 hours

content.text: In your Seller Dashboard, the Payouts tab shows all your completed orders with their payout status. Each row shows the order ID, product name, token amount, and whether the payout is 'Pending' or 'Paid'.

content.caption: The Payouts tab shows all completed orders and their payment status

content.text: EscaraPay charges a 5% commission on the token amount as a service fee. Additionally, the buyer pays a ~2% Cashfree gateway fee on top of the token. Here's a clear example:

items.title: Remaining (₹800)
items.desc: Collected directly from buyer by seller at delivery

content.text: 💡 The token is just a security deposit — the remaining 80% of the order value is your direct deal with the buyer. EscaraPay only handles the token portion.

items.title: Admin processes payment
items.desc: Within 24 hours of trigger (usually same day)

items.title: Money in your account
items.desc: Instant for UPI, 1-2 hours for bank

content.text: UTR stands for Unique Transaction Reference. It's a 12-22 digit number that uniquely identifies every bank/UPI transfer in India. When EscaraPay pays you, the UTR is sent in your payout email. You can use this number to verify the transfer with your bank if needed. In your dashboard Payouts tab, you can copy the UTR with one tap.
❓ What If I Haven't Received My Payout?

items: Check the Payouts tab — is status 'Paid' or 'Pending'?
If 'Pending' — buyer may not have confirmed yet (wait or remind them)
If 'Paid' — check your email for the UTR number
Verify the UTR with your bank or UPI app
Still not received? Email support@escarapay.in with your order ID
